components.title: Internal Policy Assistant
components.description: Minimal Entra-authenticated retrieval assistant over a synthetic policy corpus with one read-only tool and one confirmation-gated harmless consequential tool.
components.purpose: Provide a realistic but low-risk system under assurance.

control-implementations.description: Capabilities implemented by the policy assistant application and its deployment configuration.

implemented-requirements.description: Entra authentication protects the private interface; the API independently authorizes every command.
Interactive access uses Entra identities; no local application passwords are supported.
Structured telemetry records correlation ID, pseudonymous actor, status, retrieval IDs, and tool decision without routine prompt or response content.
Azure-managed ingress enforces encrypted transport and the application rejects insecure upstream configuration.
SQLite FTS5 retrieval uses only manifest-listed synthetic documents; retrieved text is treated as untrusted data.
The access-exception tool validates authorization and a server-held confirmation token before creating a synthetic request.
A configuration digest and passing fixed evaluation artifact are required by the deployment gate.
Guardrail, retrieval, tool, model, and configuration events are emitted for content-minimized monitoring.
